title: Call: If the current stock price is 50 and the strike...
summary: Analyze call option properties, pricing, or payoff structure.
prompt: If the current stock price is $50 and the strike price of a call option is $45, the option is considered:

options.text: A call option is in-the-money when the current stock price exceeds the strike

solution: A call option is in-the-money when the current stock price exceeds the strike price. [[24]]
